signals.headline: US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Announced After Iran Talks Collapse | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Announced After Iran Talks Collapse | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump announced on Sunday, April 13, 2026, that the **U.S. Navy will blockade ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz** after U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks in Pakistan ended without agreement[1][2]. signals.headline: **Strategic leverage**: Control of the Strait of Hormuz—a critical global shipping chokepoint—now represents a major str
signals.raw:
**Strategic leverage**: Control of the Strait of Hormuz—a critical global shipping chokepoint—now represents a major strategic advantage for the U.S. in this conflict[1].

This announcement directly impacts markets related to oil prices, geopolitical risk, military conflict escalation, and Iran sanctions enforcement, making it highly significant for prediction market positions.
